message:
feat(doctor): add observe mode status check (git_safety_guard-1gt.7.5)

Add Check 7 to dcg doctor that detects observe mode status:
- ACTIVE: Shows remaining time when observe window is still open
- EXPIRED: Warns prominently when observe period has ended
- INVALID: Reports if observe_until timestamp can't be parsed
- PERMANENT: Warns when warn/log mode is set without expiration
- OK: Confirms normal enforcement is active

Helps users catch the common rollout failure of enabling warn-first
mode and forgetting to tighten.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
